notes: Send all 6 starting villagers to sheep and keep making villagers nonstop.
Scout the map to find sheep, gold, and your opponent.
Put the next 3 villagers on wood and build a Lumber Camp.
Build a House to keep your population growing.
Keep most new villagers on food so you can age up quickly.
Build a Mill on berries when your sheep start to run out.
Send 3 villagers to gold and build a Mining Camp. You need gold for Knights.
With about 400 food and 200 wood, click up to the Feudal Age.
For aggression, choose the School of Cavalry landmark which makes Stables build faster.
Keep gathering food and gold during the age-up.
When you reach Feudal Age, build a Stable right away.
Start producing Knights as soon as the Stable is finished.
Add more villagers to gold so you can make Knights continuously.
French Knights are cheaper, so you can build them faster than your opponent.
Send your first group of 3 to 4 Knights to attack enemy villagers on gold or wood.
Hit and run, then retreat your Knights before they take damage from defenders.
Keep Knights pressuring the enemy economy while your villagers gather safely at home.
Build a second Stable if your gold income can support it.
Research Horsemanship at the Stable to give your Knights more health.
If the enemy is crippled, push toward the Castle Age to add more powerful units.
